creator: yuri@tsoft.com
text:
I am trying to upgrade to 7.2-BATA2.
I downloaded and burned the first CD: 7.0-BETA2-i386-disc1.iso

I boot from this CD.
Choose "Upgrade" option.
Choose CDROM media.
I get: "Unable to get packages/INDEX from the selected media.
I got the same message when I selected FTP from the Primary Site.
And today FTP options says: Unable to find 7.0-BATA2 distribution of FTP server
